programme.title: Braven
programme.desc: A logger and his father head to their hunting cabin, hoping for a quiet weekend. Instead, they find themselves in a kill-or-be-killed stand for survival when they encounter a gang of drug traffickers.

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay, Part 2
programme.desc: Katniss Everdeen realises that she is no longer fighting for survival. So, she sets out to assassinate the tyrannical President Snow and liberate the people of Panem.

programme.title: The LEGO NINJAGO Movie
programme.desc: Ostracized by everyone for being the child of a cruel overlord, a teen assembles his fellow ninjas to fight off his father.

programme.title: The Suicide Squad
programme.desc: A group of misfits are coerced to work together for a dangerous mission in Corto Maltese. Despite their differences, they learn to trust each other and collaborate as a team.

programme.title: Shazam!

programme.title: Now You See Me 2
programme.desc: Dylan secretly guides the Horsemen as they reappear with a bold plan, only to be drawn into a tech billionaire's twisted scheme involving a powerful data chip.

programme.title: Force of Execution
programme.desc: A gangster, who seeks to retire from the life of crime, faces a threat when an upcoming rival challenges his authority. He then decides to take help from a trustworthy former apprentice.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Sherlock Holmes and Dr Watson send Lord Henry Blackwood, a serial killer, to the gallows. However, they are shocked to learn that he is back from the dead and pursue him again.

programme.title: Godzilla: King of the Monsters
programme.desc: A legendary monster named King Ghidorah awakens Rodan, as well as other titans, to destroy the world. To defeat them, the crypto-zoological organisation Monarch must rely on the almighty Godzilla.

programme.title: Be Cool, Scooby-Doo!

programme.title: Fight For Love
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Falsely accused noblewoman Chu Yu (Victoria Song) teams up with Wei Yun (Ding Yuxi) to uncover a military massacre’s truth; amid war and palace intrigue, they fall in love while defending their homeland.

programme.title: Lo And Behold
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 801-850) VVD Mandarin
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: Heroes In White
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Wai-man makes a fresh start by putting on a physician coat and putting up the clinic sign. Wing-sum inspects the pharmacy, but her feet hurt due to wearing high heels. Yee-ting is jealous as Wai-man meticulously gets some new shoes for Wing-sum. Wing-sum decorates the exhibition booth.

programme.title: Legend of the Magnate
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Gu Ping Yuan (Chen Xiao), framed and exiled after failing the imperial exam, escapes with a salt caravan and rises as a daring merchant. He uncovers hidden plots, and discovers that the conspiracy that ruined him was actually aimed at the Li family.

programme.title: Lo And Behold
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: Follow Your Heart
programme.desc: While secretly investigating a case, Jiang Xin Bai, a proud prince and head constable who suffers from face blindness, meets the unorthodox Dr Yan Nan Xing, who ‘changes her appearance’ each month. They go from being at odds to solving cases together.

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 801-850) VVD Mandarin
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: Good Job
programme.desc: Eun Seon-Woo (Jung Il-Woo) owns the biggest company in Korea and secretly runs a private detective office. Don Se-Ra (Kwon Yuri) was born with hyperacuity and uses it to help people. As the arrogant and the helpful meet to solve cases together, romance blossoms.

programme.title: Big Biz Duel
programme.desc: To-ming helps Man-ho persuade other directors to support the strategic alliance proposal. They threateningly tell Chiu Hoi not to return to headquarters to attend the meeting.

programme.title: Heroes In White
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Herbal Painless launches new products Touch-Cool and Carthami PR. Wing-sum suggests using a swimmer as a spokesperson. But Yin-cho objects to her idea. And then Wing-sum realizes Wai-man’s younger sister Man-yee was once a swimmer, so this explains why Wai-man can’t get over it.

programme.title: Heroes In White
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Yin-cho wants to covertly reviews Yee-ting’s medical records. Wai-man sees through him. Ching-chi is unhappy with Ka-chun arbitrarily promoting her drawings. But she is touched by her fans’ affirmation. On the pretext of viewing some property, Yin-cho asks to meet up with Yee-ting, who again turns him down.

programme.title: Heroes In White
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Sai-hang poaches Herbal Painless spokesperson Ma Yik-chenug. Wing-sum wrongly thinks Wai-man misses the meal gathering as he is treating Yee-ting. programme.title: Not Others
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] The story revolves around Kim Eun Mi (Jeon Hye Jin), a careless physical therapist, and Kim Jin Hee (Choi Soo Young), a free-spirited adult daughter who works as a police officer, living together like ‘strangers’. Faced with the complexities of life, can they mend the rift between them?

programme.title: The Midnight Studio
programme.desc: The series tells a thrilling story of mean photographer Seo Ki Joo (Joo Won) who runs a photo studio that exists only for the deceased, passionate lawyer Han Boo (Kwon Nara) and the eerie night visitors, who travel between life and death

programme.desc: We're putting the action-packed film Nobody to the test. Booby Traps, Claymores and Riot shields make for an interesting day at the range.

programme.title: Great Aussie Road Trips
programme.desc: Central Victoria is ‘river & ranges country', and is an easy drive out of Victoria's capital,Melbourne. Epic scenery, outstanding natural beauty, lots of history, and down to earth hospitality, ourroad-trip through Central Victoria does not disappoint.

programme.title: Strangers in Danger
programme.desc: After Bangladesh, Rooftop and Catfish explore the country of Japan next. They test out their careers as sumo wrestlers and ninjas (though they learn they should probably stick to BMX), eat pufferfish, a delicacy outlawed everywhere else in Asia, and try to handle Japan's bondage culture from a dominatrix. They join in on a game of Bo Taoshi, and get saline injections to fit in with Japan's nightli

programme.title: Strangers in Danger
programme.desc: Rooftop and Catfish explore Indonesia in a fiery way. The duo test out their manhoods with leech therapy, wall jumping, participating in a traditional whip dance, and trying the ancient martial art of debus. They then slow down for a moment to stop and smell the Indonesian fruit durian and cut one out of a tree to taste test. Finally their Indonesian adventure ends with a game of flaming soccer in

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: November 15 is Michigan's firearm opener each year and is like Christmas for many hunters and Conservation Officers alike.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Michigan Conservation Officers patrol a weekend party and make sure snowmobilers are riding safely.

programme.title: Wardens Case Files
programme.desc: Wardens crack one of the largest cases in Ohio history followed by an unfortunate discovery during a routine traffic stop.

programme.title: Wardens Case Files
programme.desc: An unluckily poacher hops in the wrong boat. Then an unlikely species makes it's way onto a warden's radar.

programme.title: Andy and Ben Eat Australia - Season 3
programme.desc: In the first part of the episode, Andy explores sustainable kingfish farming in Spencer Gulf, South Australia, visiting Clean Seas sea farm and preparing fresh kingfish sashimi with the team. Moving to Kangaroo Island, he learns pickling techniques with Kate from Kangaroo Island Source, showcasing her products in a Carne Asada Taco. The episode continues with Andy exploring d'Arenberg's multi-func

programme.title: Andy and Ben Eat Australia - Season 3
programme.desc: In Kakadu National Park, Andy joins Dewayne Webb foraging pandanus and cooking Seared Buffalo with Pandanus & Charred Herb Salsa over an open fire. He then heads to Darwin, assisting Zach Green at Elijah's Kitchen, a food truck offering indigenous-inspired meals like Magpie Goose and Crocodile Laksa. Returning to Kakadu, Andy goes fishing with local Barramundi expert Rob Johnson and prepares Paper

programme.title: Sara's Australia Unveiled
programme.desc: Sara drives to East Kimberley, soaking in the scenery of the Cockburn Range mountains. Sara is so inspired by the communal spirit at Home Valley Station that she contributes by hosting a pizza night - with a wood fire oven crocodile pizza.

programme.title: CINTA TANPA KARENA EPS 367
programme.desc: couple of lovers who are prevented from being together by their parents' approval. They are Dipta (Megantara) and Nuna (Ochi Rosdiana), and they must maintain their love in secret. Due to Nuna's mother's blockade, their love tale must overcome numerous challenges.

programme.title: CINTA SEPENUH JIWA EPS 31
programme.desc: Lala is a young girl, the second daughter of Andi and Desi, who since childhood has carried enthusiasm and a smile with her every step. programme.title: MENCINTAI IPAR SENDIRI EPS 36
programme.desc: Ayuna, a beauty vlogger and model, finishes a shoot and is picked up by her younger sister, Bella. programme.desc: When fate brings Kirana and Argadewa together unexpectedly, a spark ignites between the beautiful nurse and the charming football star. But a shadow from their past still lingers—will their love be strong enough to survive the truth?

programme.title: SEINDAH CINTA MUTIARA 10
programme.desc: It tells the story of Mutiara, who must struggle hard in order to live a decent life. However, problems keep coming one after another, forcing Mutiara to become even stronger to survive them. There are even people around her who are always cruel and hateful toward her. Fortunately, there is Diandra, a friend who never stops supporting Mutiara and encouraging her to keep going.

programme.title: KAU DITAKDIRKAN UNTUKKU 225
programme.desc: Alya is a tough, independent tomboy girl. He must care for his mother, who has kidney disease, in a life full of challenges. programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: TELOLET CINTA DI ANGKOT NO 28
programme.desc: Ridwan (Naufal Samudra) is the lead singer of the band Rocker. Ridwan left home because he didn't want his mother to arrange his marriage. Ridwan also ran away from debt collectors and went to a village. One day, Ridwan disguised himself as Rimba and met Anty (Yuki Kato), a girl with a free-spirited lifestyle. Ridwan worked as a driver for Abah Bahri's minibus and lived with him, coincidentally Ab

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Cewek Jetset Kadang Bikin Wah Kadang Hah
programme.desc: One day, Alexa (Nabila Zavira) meets Darman (Erdin Werdrayana). Because she felt comfortable, Alexa complained about her father's lack of attention. Darman also complained about his family's economic condition which was in shortage and desperately needed money. Suddenly Alexa has an idea for Darman to kidnap Alexa and ask her father for ransom.

programme.title: The Librarians: The Next Chapter

programme.title: The Librarians: The Next Chapter
programme.desc: Our newly assembled Librarians crew investigates a mysterious dancing sickness, leading them to a showdown with a powerful magical factioneer at a professional ballet company.

programme.title: The Librarians: The Next Chapter
programme.desc: Half of the Librarian team gets trapped on a runaway ghost train; can the rest of the team help in solving the unresolved business of the ghosts on board before the train completes a rampage of destruction?

programme.title: The Librarians: The Next Chapter
programme.desc: The Librarians head to Paris after a string of robberies leaves mysteriously lovestruck victims in their wake. When they learn that a magical love artefact is behind the thefts, they enlist help from Vikram's old friend -- Cupid himself.

programme.title: The Librarians: The Next Chapter
programme.desc: The team goes to a college campus with a world-class observatory to discover who is using the Crystal of Dr. John Dee to steal people's memories, in order to own the future.

programme.title: The Librarians: The Next Chapter
programme.desc: When the magic door reroutes Charlie, Lysa and Connor to a bizarre manor where a series of Agatha Christie-style murders take place, they must figure out whodunit, while Vikram tries to track them down with the help of a mysterious tarot card reader.

programme.title: The Librarians: The Next Chapter
programme.desc: Connor is forced to reconnect with people from his pre-Library life, and must defeat an old adversary who has grown powerful in his absence.

programme.desc: After a wild bachelorette party with Lysa's childhood best friend, the team wakes up in rough shape and hungover, with no idea how they ended up where they are.

programme.desc: Whether it was for club or country, Stuart Pearce was one of English football's greatest servants, with a reputation as a fiercely uncompromising defender. Pearce looks back at some of the highs and lows of a playing career that took him from Nottingham Forest to Newcastle, West Ham, and Manchester City, who he would then go on to manage in memorable fashion.

programme.title: WHU v MCI
programme.desc: We delve into the Premier League archive to bring you a Classic Match from the 2014/2015 season.

programme.title: THE CATCH-UP SHOW

programme.title: PL STORIES
programme.desc: Maya Yoshida quietly became one of the Premier League's most dependable defenders during his years at Southampton, but his influence reached far beyond the pitch. In this episode, we look back at Yoshida's journey from Japan to England's top-flight, his role as a leader for club and country, and the cultural bridge he helped build along the way.

programme.title: PL STORIES
programme.desc: With exclusive access in Germany, PL Stories follows the remarkable journey of Shinji Okazaki; from his beginnings in Japanese football to becoming a Premier League champion with Leicester City and now shaping the next generation through his club Basara Mainz.

programme.title: NETBUSTERS
programme.desc: Fast-paced with music, ISO angles, and commentary, Netbusters offers an alternative review of every goal and key moment from the latest round of Premier League fixtures.

programme.title: PL REWIND
programme.desc: Gianfranco Zola signed for Chelsea in November 1996, aged 30. The Little Magician became a trailblazer as one of the Premier League's first genuine flair players, and by the time of his departure seven seasons later, he had established himself as an all-time great at Stamford Bridge.

programme.desc: Each Premier League game from the 2025/26 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: PL STORIES

programme.title: Uncharted

programme.title: Jumanji: The Next Level

programme.title: 28 Days Later
programme.desc: After a mysterious virus wreaks havoc in the United Kingdom, a team of survivors tries to cope with the aftermath of the disaster and find security.
Jackson Curtis, a discontented writer, battles against all odds to keep his family secure when a series of apocalyptic calamities threaten to decimate humankind.

programme.title: Catch The Dragon
programme.desc: A palaeontology expert embarks on a quest with a skilled hunter and a mechanic to hunt dragons and uncover the truth about his father's death.

programme.title: The Captain
programme.desc: A pilot and his crew leave no stone unturned to ensure the safety of passengers after a plane's windshield shatters at 30,000 feet.

Night Walk
programme.desc: Frank is framed for murder after his girlfriend is killed in a tragic incident during their visit to the Middle East. He is sent to a prison where he meets a Muslim inmate who helps him plan for a prison escape to prove his innocence. When his friend suddenly dies, can Frank successfully escape and seek justice for himself?

programme.title: Extreme Ends
programme.desc: Extreme Ends is an action-adventure reality show featuring four celebrities and their special guests experiencing the diversity of Hong Kong! Join Indonesian famous models Patricia and Chika as they explore the city's hidden gems and vibrant scenes, immersing themselves in amazing contrasts and trendy vibes.

programme.title: Cruel War
programme.desc: To combat the greenhouse effect, scientist Yan Xin attempts to plant newly developed super rubber seeds on a remote island, hoping to transform it into a thriving new land. Yan Xin's ex-husband decides to accompany her on this perilous journey. As conflicts arise, they encounter the local drug cartel, and a fatal battle is about to begin.

programme.title: Iron Ball
programme.desc: This sports entertainment show brings the best special forces from Iron Squad to take on a new challenge – dodgeball. The 26 players will enter a fierce competition, until a strongest team armed with powerful athletic endurance and mental strength is formed. Witness how they compete in front of the star athletes and legendary dodgeball coaches!

programme.title: Maoshan Heavenly Master
programme.desc: Prisoner Chi flees away under Master Zhang’s custody, causing the latter to be expelled from his clan. On his way to find Chi, Master Zhang arrives at a place where many people vanish for no reason. He soon discovers that it is Chi who captures them in his training to become a serpent demon. The war between human and demon has just begun!

programme.title: Iron Squad W
programme.desc: The fourth season of this Korean military survival show will determine the most elite female soldier. It brings together six Special Force units to compete in challenging missions across land, sea, and air. Top female reservists form teams of four to compete against one another. Witness how they battle to the end in front of six celebrity hosts!

programme.title: The Lost Bladesman

As Guan tries to rescue Liu Bei’s concubine from Cao, he is forced to fight his way through. Can he succeed in the end?

programme.title: Wu Lin: The Society
programme.desc: Set in 2050, where rampant pollution and viruses force people to wear masks just to breathe, yet daily life continues as usual. When a series of mysterious deaths erupts, police suspect a serial killer while rumors swirl of a demon on a rampage. Now, the police must race to unravel the mystery and stop the killings before panic consumes the city.

programme.title: Fist of Legend
programme.desc: When Chen Zhen studies in Japan, he finds several Chinese students missing and accidentally uncovers the Black Dragon Society’s conspiracy. A new drug is invented to boost bodies of the Japanese troops in war and the Chinese students are used in their experiments. Chen Zhen vows to take down the evil society and destroy their secret laboratory.

programme.desc: Talented boxer Jia Yang is caught in an underground fight to clear her father's debts. As passion and obligation collide, can Jia Yang revive her abandoned boxing dream?
